dashboard.label: Herbalife Akamai Website Health
dashboard.description: Endpoint health, latency, regional impact, and cache/origin symptoms from Akamai metrics.

search.query: index="akamai_metrics_prod" | spath input=_raw | search reqMethod="$method_filter$" reqPath="$path_filter$" reqHost="$host_filter$" | fillnull value="-" country | stats count as requests by country | eval country_label=country." (".requests.")" | sort - requests

index="akamai_metrics_prod" | spath input=_raw | spath input=_raw path=reqMethod output=raw_reqMethod | spath input=_raw path=reqPath output=raw_reqPath | spath input=_raw path=reqHost output=raw_reqHost | spath input=_raw path=country output=raw_country | spath input=_raw path=referer output=raw_referer | spath input=_raw path=statusCode output=raw_statusCode | rex field=_raw "\"statusCode\":\"?(?<rex_statusCode>\d+)\"?" | spath input=_raw path=timeToFirstByte output=raw_timeToFirstByte | rex field=_raw "\"timeToFirstByte\":\"?(?<rex_timeToFirstByte>[0-9.]+)\"?" | spath input=_raw path=downloadTime output=raw_downloadTime | rex field=_raw "\"downloadTime\":\"?(?<rex_downloadTime>[0-9.]+)\"?" | spath input=_raw path=turnAroundTimeMSec output=raw_turnAroundTimeMSec | rex field=_raw "\"turnAroundTimeMSec\":\"?(?<rex_turnAroundTimeMSec>[0-9.]+)\"?" | spath input=_raw path=transferTimeMSec output=raw_transferTimeMSec | rex field=_raw "\"transferTimeMSec\":\"?(?<rex_transferTimeMSec>[0-9.]+)\"?" | spath input=_raw path=tlsOverheadTimeMSec output=raw_tlsOverheadTimeMSec | rex field=_raw "\"tlsOverheadTimeMSec\":\"?(?<rex_tlsOverheadTimeMSec>[0-9.]+)\"?" | spath input=_raw path=edgeAttempts output=raw_edgeAttempts | spath input=_raw path=throughput output=raw_throughput | eval reqMethod=coalesce(reqMethod, raw_reqMethod), reqPath=coalesce(reqPath, raw_reqPath), reqHost=coalesce(reqHost, raw_reqHost), country=coalesce(country, raw_country), referer=coalesce(referer, raw_referer), status_code=coalesce(mvindex(statusCode,0), mvindex(raw_statusCode,0), rex_statusCode), statusCode=status_code, timeToFirstByte=coalesce(mvindex(timeToFirstByte,0), mvindex(raw_timeToFirstByte,0), rex_timeToFirstByte), downloadTime=coalesce(mvindex(downloadTime,0), mvindex(raw_downloadTime,0), rex_downloadTime), turnAroundTimeMSec=coalesce(mvindex(turnAroundTimeMSec,0), mvindex(raw_turnAroundTimeMSec,0), rex_turnAroundTimeMSec), transferTimeMSec=coalesce(mvindex(transferTimeMSec,0), mvindex(raw_transferTimeMSec,0), rex_transferTimeMSec), tlsOverheadTimeMSec=coalesce(mvindex(tlsOverheadTimeMSec,0), mvindex(raw_tlsOverheadTimeMSec,0), rex_tlsOverheadTimeMSec), edgeAttempts=coalesce(edgeAttempts, raw_edgeAttempts), throughput=coalesce(throughput, raw_throughput) | search reqMethod="$method_filter$" reqPath="$path_filter$" | search reqHost="$host_filter$" country="$country_filter$" | eval status=tonumber(status_code), ttfb=tonumber(replace(timeToFirstByte,"[^0-9.]","")), download_ms=tonumber(replace(downloadTime,"[^0-9.]","")), turnaround_ms=tonumber(replace(turnAroundTimeMSec,"[^0-9.]","")), transfer_ms=tonumber(replace(transferTimeMSec,"[^0-9.]","")), tls_ms=tonumber(replace(tlsOverheadTimeMSec,"[^0-9.]","")), edge_attempts=tonumber(edgeAttempts), throughput_kbps=tonumber(throughput) | eval status_class=case( status=0, "no_response", status>=200 AND status<300, "2xx", status>=300 AND status<400, "3xx", status>=400 AND status<500, "4xx", status>=500 AND status<600, "5xx", true(), "unknown" ) | eval is_2xx=if(status>=200 AND status<300,1,0), is_3xx=if(status>=300 AND status<400,1,0), is_4xx=if(status>=400 AND status<500,1,0), is_5xx=if(status>=500 AND status<600,1,0), is_no_response=if(status=0,1,0), is_error=if(status>=500 OR status=0,1,0), is_slow_ttfb=if(ttfb>tonumber("$ttfb_threshold$"),1,0), is_slow_download=if(download_ms>tonumber("$download_threshold$"),1,0) | where "$status_class_filter$"="*" OR status_class="$status_class_filter$" | fillnull value="-" reqHost reqPath referer country state serverCountry billingRegion cacheStatus statusCode status_code

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests sum(is_error) as errors | eval availability=round(((requests-errors)/requests)*100,3) | fields availability

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests sum(is_error) as errors | eval error_rate=round((errors/requests)*100,5) | fields error_rate

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats perc95(ttfb) as p95 | eval p95=round(p95,0)

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests

panel.title: Availability, Errors, and Latency Over Time

search.query: | where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | timechart span=5m count as requests sum(is_error) as errors perc95(ttfb) as p95 perc99(ttfb) as p99 | eval error_pct=round((errors/requests)*100,5), availability_pct=round(((requests-errors)/requests)*100,3), p95=round(p95,0), p99=round(p99,0) | fields _time requests errors error_pct availability_pct p95 p99
| stats count as requests sum(is_error) as errors perc95(ttfb) as p95 by reqHost | eval error_pct=round((errors/requests)*100,3), p95=round(p95,0) | sort - requests | head 50

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests sum(is_error) as server_or_no_response_errors sum(is_4xx) as client_errors_4xx perc95(ttfb) as p95 by reqHost | where requests >= 20 | eval total_http_errors=server_or_no_response_errors+client_errors_4xx | eval error_pct=round((total_http_errors/requests)*100,3), client_error_pct=round((client_errors_4xx/requests)*100,3), server_error_pct=round((server_or_no_response_errors/requests)*100,3), p95=round(p95,0) | sort - error_pct - requests | head 50

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests count(ttfb) as ttfb_samples sum(is_error) as errors perc50(ttfb) as p50 perc95(ttfb) as p95 perc99(ttfb) as p99 perc95(download_ms) as p95_download_ms by reqHost | where requests >= 20 | eval error_pct=round((errors/requests)*100,3), p50=round(p50,0), p95=round(p95,0), p99=round(p99,0), p95_download_ms=round(p95_download_ms,0) | eval p95_sort=if(isnull(p95),-1,p95) | sort - p95_sort - requests | fields - p95_sort | head 50

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests count(ttfb) as ttfb_samples sum(is_error) as errors sum(is_slow_ttfb) as slow_ttfb_requests perc50(ttfb) as p50 perc95(ttfb) as p95 perc99(ttfb) as p99 perc95(download_ms) as p95_download_ms values(status_code) as status_codes by reqHost reqPath | where requests >= 20 | eval error_pct=round((errors/requests)*100,3), slow_ttfb_pct=round((slow_ttfb_requests/requests)*100,2), p50=round(p50,0), p95=round(p95,0), p99=round(p99,0), p95_download_ms=round(p95_download_ms,0) | eval p95_sort=if(isnull(p95),-1,p95) | sort - p95_sort - requests | fields - p95_sort | head 50

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | eval is_client_error=if(status>=400 AND status<500,1,0), bad_request=if(is_error=1 OR is_client_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1,1,0) | stats count as requests sum(bad_request) as bad_requests sum(is_error) as server_errors sum(is_client_error) as client_errors sum(is_slow_ttfb) as slow_ttfb sum(is_slow_download) as slow_downloads count(ttfb) as ttfb_samples perc95(ttfb) as p95 perc95(download_ms) as p95_download values(referer) as referers values(status_code) as status_codes by reqHost reqPath | where requests >= 20 | eval bad_pct=round((bad_requests/requests)*100,2), server_error_pct=round((server_errors/requests)*100,3), client_error_pct=round((client_errors/requests)*100,3), p95=round(p95,0), p95_download=round(p95_download,0), referer=mvjoin(mvindex(referers,0,4),", ") | fields - referers | eval p95_sort=if(isnull(p95),-1,p95) | sort - bad_pct - bad_requests - p95_sort - requests | fields - p95_sort | head 50

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests sum(is_2xx) as 2xx sum(is_3xx) as 3xx sum(is_4xx) as 4xx sum(is_5xx) as 5xx sum(is_no_response) as no_response by reqHost | where requests >= 20 | eval "2xx %"=round(('2xx'/requests)*100,2), "3xx %"=round(('3xx'/requests)*100,2), "4xx %"=round(('4xx'/requests)*100,2), "5xx %"=round(('5xx'/requests)*100,2), "No Response %"=round((no_response/requests)*100,2) | table reqHost requests "2xx %" "3xx %" "4xx %" "5xx %" "No Response %" 2xx 3xx 4xx 5xx no_response | sort - "5xx %" - "4xx %" - requests | head 50

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests by status_code | sort - requests | head 25

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests by reqHost status_code | eventstats sum(requests) as host_total by reqHost | where host_total >= 20 | eval pct=round((requests/host_total)*100,2) | sort - pct - requests

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests sum(is_error) as errors perc95(ttfb) as p95 perc99(ttfb) as p99 perc95(download_ms) as p95_download_ms by country state serverCountry billingRegion reqHost | where requests >= 20 | eval error_pct=round((errors/requests)*100,3), availability_pct=round(((requests-errors)/requests)*100,3), p95=round(p95,0), p99=round(p99,0), p95_download_ms=round(p95_download_ms,0) | sort - error_pct - p95

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests sum(is_error) as errors perc95(ttfb) as p95 perc95(turnaround_ms) as p95_turnaround_ms perc95(download_ms) as p95_download_ms avg(edge_attempts) as avg_edge_attempts avg(throughput_kbps) as avg_throughput by reqHost cacheStatus | eval error_pct=round((errors/requests)*100,3), p95=round(p95,0), p95_turnaround_ms=round(p95_turnaround_ms,0), p95_download_ms=round(p95_download_ms,0), avg_edge_attempts=round(avg_edge_attempts,2), avg_throughput=round(avg_throughput,2) | sort - error_pct - p95

| where "$health_filter$"="all" OR ("$health_filter$"="errors" AND is_error=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_ttfb" AND is_slow_ttfb=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="slow_download" AND is_slow_download=1) OR ("$health_filter$"="bad" AND (is_error=1 OR is_slow_ttfb=1 OR is_slow_download=1)) | stats count as requests sum(is_error) as errors perc95(ttfb) as p95 by reqHost reqPath country | where requests >= 10 | eval error_pct=round((errors/requests)*100,3), p95=round(p95,0) | eventstats avg(error_pct) as avg_page_error_pct avg(p95) as avg_page_p95 by reqHost reqPath | eval error_skew=round(error_pct-avg_page_error_pct,3), latency_skew_ms=round(p95-avg_page_p95,0) | where error_skew > 2 OR latency_skew_ms > 1000 | sort - error_skew - latency_skew_ms | head 50
